text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->suspended


from: 
http://hplip.sourceforge.net/troubleshooting/toolbox.html 

Only devices installed that are using the "hp:" backend will display in the 
Device Manager. Re-install the printer using the "hp:" device URI and then 
re-fresh (with F6) or re-run the Device Manager. 

There is no "hp:" backend in the CUPS sources. 
Please provide pointers to this module.
